profile.name: Alex Morgan
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.bio: Software engineer with 5+ years of experience designing scalable web applications, cloud infrastructure, and data-driven products. I focus on clean architecture, developer experience, and shipping features that move business metrics. Comfortable across the stack, from React frontends to distributed backend services and CI/CD automation.
